title: More Grindstone Variants Z
description: A LevelZ Addon for the More Grindstone Variants mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the More Grindstone Variants mod.

This addon adds level requirements for all additional grindstones to fit seamlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the More Grindstone Variants mod to your mod packs without worrying about skipping progression.
